data.title: DESIGN.md: reconcile blessed exceptions (3D palette, px-[22%], Navbar type, FractalPattern convention, body emphasis)

data.body:
COLD review (cwd-verified at file:line; diff = DESIGN.md only, 16+/2-).

YAML front-matter UNTOUCHED: all 5 diff hunks at L179+; fences sit at L1/L83 — front-matter region clean. ✓

Per-item truth check:
- D1 (3D palette): TRUE. All listed hexes verified in source — OctahedronHero.tsx (e8e0d0/e0c880/ddb866/cc9955/c4a265/bb8844/8a7a6a; 8a7a6a is forum face-color), FractalCityScene.tsx (ffaa66/ffcc88/f5f0ea/aabbcc/ffffff), heroNavNodes.ts:11 PALETTE_FALLBACK='#c4a265'. #aabbcc is indeed the cool-fill directionalLight (FractalCityScene.tsx:17). All 11 are grandfathered in design-conformance.baseline.json. Correctly framed as out-of-token/WebGL, NOT as tokens. ✓
- D2 (md:px-[22%]): TRUE. All four sites carry 'px-6 md:px-[22%]' — EventsPage.tsx:36, LabPage.tsx:38, NeighborhoodPage.tsx:34, components/sections/LiberalArts.tsx:8 (the 'LiberalArts.tsx:8' cite is unambiguous; LiberalArtsPage.tsx has none). Mobile-px-6 placement correct. ✓
- D3 (Navbar): TRUE. Doc no longer says ONLY the wordmark is inline-styled. Real file is src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx (doc cites bare 'Navbar.tsx', fine). Every cited line (~78,90,100,180,186,218,225,273,285,318,347) lands EXACTLY on inline fontSize/fontWeight/fontFamily props; weight-100 AND weight-300 mono both present (82/104/286); Jacquard 24 caps + clamp() confirmed. ✓
- D4 (FractalPattern): convention is TRUE — FractalPattern.tsx injects color into SVG stroke/fill presentation attrs (50,57,63,91,117,125) where var() can't resolve; PoliticalClubPage.tsx:12 PC_COLOR=HOUSES.find(h=>h.id==='forum')!.palette.light matches verbatim; first-child-of-<main> + Sierpinski confirmed; SECTIONS.* sourcing real (PeoplePage:12, StoryPage:22). FRAC-206 cite sensible. BUT one FALSE claim: 'FRAC-219 applied it to the remaining five house pages' — FRAC-219 impl commit c1aa5d2 is NOT in master and NOT an ancestor of HEAD (lives unmerged on frac-219-fractalpattern-data-model). On THIS branch the 5 pages still pass hand-typed literal hex: CampusPage:14 #1A3A2E, EventsPage:20 #C13B2A, LabPage:20 #C44878, LiberalArtsPage:14 #C41E20, NeighborhoodPage:17 #4A5A30. So the past-tense claim contradicts real code — cardinal-rule violation.
- D5 (font-semibold): TRUE. <strong className='font-semibold text-background'> at Campus.tsx:333,340,354,358,572,714; blessed in Body tier. ✓

Coherence/voice: terse editorial register matches the doc; no broken cross-links (D3 §Typography <-> §Components 'see §Typography' resolves; D1 baseline-intent framing consistent). No dangling refs.

Gate: node scripts/design-conformance.mjs GREEN (exit 0, 28 grandfathered/19 sanctioned). Diff is DESIGN.md-only.

VERDICT: FAIL — implementation-level (wording). Plan sound; 4/5 items truthful; D4's convention accurate. Single fix: D4's last clause asserts FRAC-219's unmerged code as done. Either (a) land FRAC-219 (c1aa5d2) into this branch/master first, or (b) reword to reflect reality — e.g. 'PoliticalClub + People source from the data model today; FRAC-219 extends the convention to the remaining five house pages (still passing literal hex until it lands).' Do not ship the doc claiming code-state that isn't on the branch.

Orchestrator applied the review's one finding inline (minor wording fix, not a rework cycle): D4 reworded 'FRAC-219 applied it to the remaining 5 pages' (false on this branch — FRAC-219 is unmerged on PR #254) → 'FRAC-219 extends it to...'. All other items verified true by cold review. Conformance green. Moving to done.
